sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02');
SELECT id, dayname(event_date) AS weekday FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-03' WHERE id = 1;
